verifications.title: NPS uses rolling 90-day window, not quarterly
verifications.content: NPS is calculated using a rolling 90-day window, not quarterly snapshots.
verifications.user_quote: Not quite. We use a rolling 90-day NPS, not quarterly. The current score should be around 52.

verifications.title: MAU retention definition
verifications.content: MAU retention = percentage of users active in month N who were also active in month N-1.
verifications.user_quote: Also, FYI, our retention metric is defined as the percentage of users who are active in month N who were also active in month N-1. We call it MAU retention.
